data.title: Laboratory Director - AtoG Labs
data.raw_snippet:
**Laboratory Director – AtoG Labs****Location:** Dubai, UAE  

**Reports to:** Board of Directors

**About AtoG Labs:**  

AtoG Labs is a high\-technology molecular diagnostics and genetics laboratory dedicated to advancing personalized medicine in the UAE and beyond. Our multidisciplinary expertise covers molecular biology, genetic sequencing, oncology biomarkers, infectious disease testing, and women’s health diagnostics. The Corporate Advisory Director will lead client advisory engagements, providing strategic guidance on corporate finance, M\&A, capital structure, and broader business transformation initiatives. data.title: Head of Department – Pediatrics (American Board, Arabic Speaker) - Qatar
data.raw_snippet:
Position Overview
  
A prestigious healthcare institution in Qatar is seeking a highly qualified Head of Department for Pediatrics to lead its pediatric division. The ideal candidate must be American Board Certified in Pediatrics and fluent in Arabic, with a strong background in clinical leadership, multidisciplinary collaboration, and patient\-centered care.
